26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @PaintMags did this gorgeous lake painting. Check out their other posts for more awesome art.
27 Man Tax: Dylan O'Brien
“The eyes of fear want you to put bigger locks on your doors, buy guns, close yourself off. The eyes of love, instead, see all of us as one.” - Bill Hicks So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: 100% correct. And also israel blackmailing Trump cos of his pedo videos
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Serious momentum, my dudes. Gonna keep it going, full steam.
item.description:
Longest I have gone without a drink since my momma passed roughly a year ago. She was always worried about my drinking and one of the last conversations I had with her before she passed was about how I had been 3 weeks sober (at the time. Gonna keep doing this for me but also for my Momma’s memory.
Have some Cheddar Bae Biscuit tax. He’s at the vet and unhappy at the moment.
item.dc:creator: BobWeAdaBabyEetsAboy

item.title: I taped some bottom shelf memes to a random tree I found in a church parking lot
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
If you're still scrolling, then I assume you and I must have similar tastes in shitposting. Well, all these memes were stolen fair and square from discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Feel free to dive into the dumpster fire to steal and deal memes 24/7.
Calm down, I didn't crop the watermark. This is Cyanide and Happiness.
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: A dump for my fellow Sapphics
item.description:
I feel like this is a DEEP wound for a lot of us. Been through this multiple times myself. Bruh.
To be fair most of the time I just dress like Adam Sandler..
It's the autism, in my case...
The average lesbian experience..
two girls, chilling on the sofa, 5 feet apart cause they’re not gay

item.title: In Fairness. — The President Of The United States. About American Soldiers Dying. In Fairness.
item.description: Trump was just asked on Fox News if Putin is helping Iran kill American soldiers. His response was "yeah a little bit" and then said "in fairness WE help Ukraine so it's fine." THE PRESIDENT JUST SHRUGGED OFF RUSSIA HELPING KILL HIS OWN SOLDIERS. ON FUCKING FOX NEWS. ??? "In fairness we help them also. It's like hey, they do it and we do it." SIR. SIR. That is not geopolitical analysis. That is a man explaining why two wrongs make a right TO JUSTIFY THE COUNTRY HE TRUSTS MORE THAN HIS OWN CIA HELPING KILL AMERICAN SOLDIERS. ?⚰️? Six confirmed dead. 560 reported. Russia feeding Iran targeting data. And the President's response on national television is essentially "well technically it's fair because both sides are doing it." THESE ARE YOUR SOLDIERS. THEIR FAMILIES ARE WATCHING THIS. WHAT THE FUCK. ????️ Trump just told Fox News that Putin helping Iran kill Americans is fine because "in fairness" America helps Ukraine. He has officially both-sided the deaths of his own soldiers on breakfast television. History will not be kind. It will not be kind AT ALL. ?⚰️?? #TrumpPutin #IranWar #AmericanSoldiers #GoldStarFamilies #Treason #RussiaGate #InFairness #BothSides #FoxNews #WTF
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: 90% of copilot use was people accidently clicking on it then saying "Fuck" and closing it.

item.title: Simone!
item.description: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! (Credit to my discord server friends for helping me with name suggestions! I post art and wips on there.)
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.dc:creator: danwhitfield

item.title: She’s got a favorite position
item.description: My pregnant foster mama cat, Bobbie, is REALLY uncomfortable. Her new favorite thing to do is flop down next to me and I put my hand on her belly and she kicks her leg up onto my arm and curls her torso towards me. She’ll lay here for a while and then she’ll jump down to lay on the hardwood floor and then she’ll start meowing randomly and I’m like, oh, here we go! And then she yells at me for food and eats half a can. We’ve been doing this all night. I don’t think it’s gonna happen tonight but I’ll give it another episode of Scandal and then pass out for a bit. I’ll keep checking on her, though. And I may have to miss Dadurday tomorrow at my dad’s house. I’m sure he’ll understand.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Boom Boom Tel Aviv
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1639 (no bite)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
I love Hooded Mergansers.
I do someday want to create a gin cocktail inspired by this bird....
Someone should make art of a giant pterosaur like Hatzegopteryx doing this.
Pippin, at least 50 percent of the time.
This is an adorable mental image.
Pippin tax (and Baja cameo again) Today's message from Pippin: "What are you doing? Good boy pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: He provided clothing, food, shelter, and paid for my education, as he did for some of those in my generation.
item.description: In my lifetime, the presidents who genuinely demonstrated love for this country were Kennedy, Johnson, Carter, and, surprisingly, Herbert Walker Bush. Good luck! Vote.gov anybody can get a mail-in ballot by saying they're sick; call your County seat. There's too much urgency not to vote. Apathy is no longer an. It's only been a year, change gears. The response now taking shape isn’t just political—it’s collective. It’s nurses, teachers, farmers, tech workers, seniors, immigrants—all rediscovering the power of us. Start simple: Register. Vote. Show up. Join a union and/or coalition. Back the fighters: •ACLU – Defending civil rights in every courtroom. https://aflcio.org/ •SEIU – Organizing service and care workers for fair pay. Indivisible – Mobilizing grassroots democracy advocates •NOW – Championing equality and reproductive justice. Public Citizen – Holding corporations and lobbyists accountable. •AFL‑CIO – Uniting workers across industries and states. •NEA – Standing up for public education and teachers. https://www.nea.org/ •MADRE – Advancing global women’s and human rights.https://www.madre.org/ •SPLC – Confronting hate groups and systemic injustice.https://www.splcenter.org/ •AARP – Fighting for dignity and security in aging.https://www.aarp.org/ https://mutualaidnetwork.org/ https://www.mutualaidhub.org/ https://olmsapps.dol.gov/query/getOrgQry.do https://ua.org/join-the-ua/find-a-local-union/ This is what democracy looks like when it remembers itself. They think 98% of us will quietly adapt to there propaganda. They're wrong. vote.gov https://rbreich.com/ top right menu videos
item.dc:creator: Shawnofavitch
